<Meta title="Tokens/Colors/Theme Sandbox" />

# Theme Sandbox

Two interactive full-page layouts for exploring how the color system behaves in practice. Use these to validate component dial combinations before applying them to a real site.

## Component Theme Pairings

Mix and match individual component dials — header, footer, banner, callout, tabs, and more — to see how they look together on a single global theme. Use the toolbar to switch the global theme lever while keeping your dial selections.

<Canvas of={ColorsStories.ComponentThemeColorPairings} />
<Controls of={ColorsStories.ComponentThemeColorPairings} />

## Global Theme Pairings

See how the same component dial configuration renders across all six global palettes. Useful for understanding how a layout will shift if a site changes its global theme.

<Canvas of={ColorsStories.GlobalThemeColorPairings} />
<Controls of={ColorsStories.GlobalThemeColorPairings} />
